headline: Barclays Maintains Overweight on Xcel Energy, Lowers Price Target to $87
summary: Barclays  analyst Nicholas Campanella   maintains Xcel Energy (NASDAQ:XEL) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $91 to $87.
